structure.unit: Warehouses, Cold Storage and Refrigerated Locker Plants
Handling and Sale of Burley Tobacco

law.catch_line: Information to be accurate and substantiated
law.text: Any information pertaining to weights of tobacco sold, prices paid or amounts of tobacco handled, disseminated by any warehouseman, his employees or agents shall be accurate and substantiated by records kept at the warehouse or loosefloor.
